creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Fri Jun 28 11:51:08 2013
New Revision: 321958
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/321958

Log:
  multimedia/libtuner: update to 1.1.0
  
  - Update to 1.1.0 [1]
  - Trim Makefile header [1]
  - Fix pkg-plist
  
  PR:		ports/180047
  Submitted by:	Jason A Harmening <jason.harmening@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/multimedia/libtuner/Makefile
  head/multimedia/libtuner/distinfo
  head/multimedia/libtuner/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/multimedia/libtuner/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/libtuner/Makefile	Fri Jun 28 11:51:05 2013	(r321957)
+++ head/multimedia/libtuner/Makefile	Fri Jun 28 11:51:08 2013	(r321958)
@@ -1,12 +1,8 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:   libtuner
-# Date created:        7 September 2008
-# Whom:                jah
-#
+# Created by: Jason Harmening <jason.harmening@gmail.com>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	libtuner
-PORTVERSION=	1.0.9
+PORTVERSION=	1.1.0
 CATEGORIES=	multimedia
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://corona.homeunix.net/ports/libtuner/
 
@@ -15,7 +11,7 @@ COMMENT=	Userspace drivers for various T
 
 LICENSE=	BSD
 
-MAKE_ARGS+=	LIBTUNER_MAJOR=1 LIBTUNER_MINOR=0 LIBTUNER_REV=9 INSTALLDIR=${PREFIX}
+MAKE_ARGS+=	INSTALLDIR=${PREFIX}
 USE_LDCONFIG=	${PREFIX}/lib/libtuner
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

+SIZE (libtuner-1.1.0.tar.gz) = 97383

 lib/libtuner/libtuner.so
